arts.ttl: Lyon v Manchester United: Europa League quarter-final, first leg – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates from 8pm BST kick-off Live scoreboard | Follow Spurs v Frankfurt live The Lyon manager Paulo Fonseca is currently serving a nine-month domestic ban for confronting a referee. Nick Ames spoke to him. Ruben Amorim sticks with the XI that started the goalless draw against Manchester City on Sunday. Kobbie Mainoo is back among the substitutes for United. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Romano transfer hint gives Man Utd solution to Hojlund and striker problem
arts.sum: With Juve desperate to avoid Vlahovic leaving on a free next summer, the Italian giants may be willing to broker a swap deal for Hojlund, allowing them afford to sign the United man and also getting value out of their departing star. Juve are looking for a new striker themselves, with Dusan Vlahovic likely to be sold as the he enters the final year of his contract, and the Serbian may emerge as a shrewd option to replace Hojlund at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Christian Eriksen future: Premier League manager opens door to 33-year-old's arrival this summer
arts.sum: Denmark head coach Thomas Frank says that he would be interested in speaking with Manchester United Christian Eriksen about a return to the club this summer.

arts.ttl: Man United forward 'being monitored by Italian clubs' as Red Devils 'consider summer sale'
